title: LoFi Records to Mine To
description:
Adds 31 new original tracks in the form of Music Discs

- Disclaimer: Not LoFi
body:
LoFi Records to Mine To adds 31 new Music Discs which each have an original song by my father, 1micah5. You can find these on his [Soundcloud](https://soundcloud.com/lordmicah) and [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCF_Xz4U2TpkJawDGlLnBTyA) pages.


The songs included are:

* A Little Something
* A Mix of Sound and Space
* Alone
* Face It
* Falling Leaves
* Fall's First Sunday
* Finger Puppets
* Happy Birthday
* In Search of Life
* Interdimensional
* It's Inside
* Look at the Camera
* Making Ways
* Memory Loss
* Normal
* Overhead
* Plucked
* Remember
* Render
* Running From Giants
* Shadow People
* Space Whales
* Survived By...
* There There
* Thicker
* Time Rider
* Turning Over Rocks
* Uncanny
* War
* When it Rains
* Wind
